title: Suggestions for Integrating Monday.com and Quickbooks Desktop
excerpt: Hello! I am trying to find an easy way to integrate Monday.com and Quickbooks desktop. I have found a couple of companies that can do this, but I wanted to see if anyone has any suggestions. We are ideally looking for a …

posts.author: Mia (Mia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I am trying to find an easy way to integrate Monday.com and Quickbooks desktop. I have found a couple of companies that can do this, but I wanted to see if anyone has any suggestions. We are ideally looking for a two way connection that integrates with the new Monday Quotes and invoices feature. Thanks!

posts.author: Stackfully (Daniel - Stackfully Integrations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mia, we’ve built an integration at Stackfully called QuickBooks for monday.com, though just to clarify, it currently works with QuickBooks Online, not the Desktop version.

It’s a two-way sync that supports invoices, estimates, customers, and products, and it plays well with international accounts (VAT, multi-currency, etc.). If you ever transition to QuickBooks Online, it could be a good fit.
